task_completion.description: Navigate to the accounting or payments module in Ekylibre.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekylibre interface is visible with the Accounting, Finances, or Payments section selected in the navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Open the form to record a new outgoing payment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or dialog for creating a new payment, outgoing payment, or expense is visible on the screen.
The text 'Coopérative Agricole du Centre' is entered or selected in the supplier, payee, or third-party field.
The date '2024-06-15' (or '15/06/2024', 'June 15, 2024') is entered in the date field.
The value '3250', '3250.00', or '3,250.00' is entered in the amount field.

task_completion.description: Save or confirm the payment record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Payment created') is visible, or the newly created payment appears in the list of recent transactions with the correct details.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ekylibre web interface to record the payment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Ekylibre application, not a terminal or API client.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or Rails console to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing Ruby/Rails scripts or direct database SQL queries to insert the payment.

integrity.description: The agent actually entered the data into the application fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The input fields for payee, date, and amount are populated within the Ekylibre form, rather than being pasted into a text editor or unrelated application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The payment must be exactly 3,250.00 EUR (tolerance 0.01 EUR). The payee must be 'Coopérative Agricole du Centre'. The date must be June 15, 2024 (2024-06-15). The task must be completed within the Ekylibre web interface.
